title: OpenAI Careers -- iOS Engineer postings (Applied Foundations, ChatGPT Mobile Infrastructure, Social Products, Monetization, Sora)
note: Searched and enumerated OpenAI's live iOS openings; every posting found is Senior or Staff+ scoped (e.g. Applied Foundations posting pay band $255K-$310K base is explicitly a Senior role). No junior/new-grad iOS requisitions found, evidencing the thin market for this cell.
